nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-sided gerygone
nodes.summary: The rufous-sided gerygone (Gerygone dorsalis) is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae. It is found in the eastern Lesser Sunda Islands and Kai Islands. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical mangrove forests. References

nodes.name: 卡伊群島
nodes.summary: 卡伊群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括Rufous-sided gerygone、帝汶鹃鵙、Australasian figbird等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。
